style_effects: Constant golden-yellow static sparks drift upward in erratic bursts around Magikarp's body, with electric-blue energy trails leaving faint afterimages as it moves; a pulsing, vibrant cyan aura radiates from its eyes and tail, distorting the air with subtle electromagnetic ripples; the lighting mood is a bright, energetic glow of electric white and gold, casting sharp, dynamic highlights on its scales; Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
